---
date: 2025/05/15
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
---

# Reproducibility

## {[renv](https://rstudio.github.io/renv/)}

This project uses the {renv} package to manage dependencies. To install the required packages, run the following command in the R console:

``` r
renv::restore()
```

This will install all the packages listed in the `renv.lock` file.

## {[sjSDM](https://theoreticalecology.github.io/s-jSDM/)}

This project uses {[sjSDM](https://theoreticalecology.github.io/s-jSDM/)} (Scalable Joint Species Distribution Models), which requires a Python back-end (PyTorch). After installing the R package, set up the Python environment with:

``` r
sjSDM::install_sjSDM()
```

You can verify the setup using the project helper function:

``` r
source("R/___setup_project___.R")
verify_sjsdm_setup()
```

## {[targets](https://docs.ropensci.org/targets/)}

Currently, the project is coded as a {[targets](https://docs.ropensci.org/targets/)} pipeline and can be executed using the following command:

```{r}
#| eval=FALSE
source(
  here::here("R/02_Main_analyses/01_Run_pipelines.R")
)
```
